mapper.select: SELECT cctv_id, cctv_name, road_name, stream_url, district, latitude, longitude, is_active, TO_CHAR(updated_at AT TIME ZONE 'Asia/Seoul', 'YY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS updated_at FROM cctv_info WHERE is_active = true ORDER BY cctv_name ASC

SELECT cctv_id, cctv_name, road_name, stream_url, district, latitude, longitude, is_active, TO_CHAR(updated_at AT TIME ZONE 'Asia/Seoul', 'YY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS updated_at FROM cctv_info WHERE is_active = true ORDER BY cctv_name ASC LIMIT 1

SELECT cctv_id, cctv_name, road_name, stream_url, district, latitude, longitude, is_active, TO_CHAR(updated_at AT TIME ZONE 'Asia/Seoul', 'YY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS updated_at FROM cctv_info WHERE cctv_id = #{cctvId}
